\section{Introduction}

\begin{frame}{Motivation}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Beamer cannot produce tagged, accessible PDFs.
    \item Typst can.
    \item This deck exercises the conversion pipeline.
  \end{itemize}
\end{frame}

\begin{frame}{Goals}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Convert plain decks end to end.
    \item Preserve sections, text, lists, and math.
    \item Copy included images unchanged.
  \end{itemize}
\end{frame}

\begin{frame}{A Little Math}
  The quadratic formula (numbered equation):
  \begin{equation}
    x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}
  \end{equation} \label{eq:quadratic_formula}
  and an inline relation $E = mc^2$. Cross reference: Equation \ref{eq:quadratic_formula}.
  
  The following equation is not numbered:
  \begin{equation*}
    x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}
  \end{equation*}

  Citation: \textcite{hawking1975particle}, \parencite{einstein1935can}, This\footcite{einstein1935can} is footnote citation.
\end{frame}
